The '''Outbound Flight Colony''' was a corporate government on a [[Unidentified planetoid (The Redoubt)|remote]] [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]] in [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]], located in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was established from [[Survivors (Outbound Flight)|survivors]] of the ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' after it was [[Battle for Outbound Flight|destroyed]] by the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]]. It was led by a [[Director/Legends|Director]], and the [[Managing Council]], with the governing document being the [[Charter]].<ref name="SQ" />

==History==
In [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], the Outbound Flight Colony was disbanded after the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] discovered the site, and the survivors were relocated to the [[Empire of the Hand]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].<ref name="SQ" />
